question: Tell me about a time you disagreed with a teammate on a technical decision. How did you resolve it?
Describe a project where you had to learn a new technology quickly. How did you approach it?
Walk me through a production incident you owned end to end.
Given a stream of integers, design a structure to return the median at any point.
Find the longest substring without repeating characters and explain your complexity.
Detect a cycle in a linked list and return the node where the cycle begins.
Design a URL shortener that handles 100M new links per day. Discuss data model and scaling.
How would you design a rate limiter for a public API used by millions of clients?
Design an idempotent payment processing service. How do you guarantee exactly-once semantics?
Tell me about a time you improved the performance of a slow service. What was the bottleneck?
Describe a model you shipped to production. How did you measure its real-world impact?
Explain the bias-variance tradeoff and how you'd diagnose which one is hurting your model.
When would you choose precision-recall over ROC-AUC as your evaluation metric?
Design a recommendation system for a marketplace with cold-start users and items.
Tell me about a time your analysis contradicted a stakeholder's expectation. What did you do?
Describe a feature you killed. How did you decide, and how did you communicate it?
Tell me about a time you used data to change a roadmap decision.
How would you improve the onboarding experience of a product you use daily?
Pick a metric for a ride-sharing app and explain why it best reflects product health.
Design a low-latency model serving system that supports A/B testing of model versions.
How would you build a real-time fraud detection pipeline with strict latency budgets?
Design a zero-downtime deployment pipeline for a fleet of microservices.
